summary: Returns the file extension from the final path segment, including its leading dot, after validating the input as a path string.
signature_intent: Accepts a path-like string and returns a string extension or an empty string when no extension is present.
behavior: Considers only the final path segment.
Returns the substring from the last extension dot through the end of the final segment.
Includes the leading dot in the returned extension.
Returns an empty string when the final segment has no extension.
edge_cases: Returns an empty string for an empty path or a path containing only separators.
Returns an empty string for hidden-style names with no additional extension.
Returns an empty string for single-dot or double-dot final segments.
Returns an empty string when the only dot does not indicate an extension.
